meta-description: Learn about UCR (Usual, Customary, and Reasonable) costs by reviewing the defintion in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: UCR (usual, customary, and reasonable)
excerpt: The amount paid for a medical service in a geographic area based on what providers in the area usually charge for the same or similar medical service. The UCR amount sometimes is used to determine the allowed amount.
content: The amount paid for a medical service in a geographic area based on what providers in the area usually charge for the same or similar medical service. The UCR amount sometimes is used to determine the allowed amount.
